aboutpara: I'm Dimuthu Wickramanayake, a Senior Platform Engineer with 7+ years of experience architecting distributed systems, high-throughput API platforms, and production AI infrastructure across AWS and GCP. I build cloud-native microservices on Kubernetes sustaining thousands of requests per second, real-time data streaming pipelines at petabyte scale, and LLM-powered application workflows. I'm an active open-source contributor — my published libraries include Limbiq (an adaptive AI memory system on PyPI), PII Guard (a Rust privacy proxy for LLMs), and Living LLM (a self-improving local AI system with persistent memory and knowledge graphs). Beyond engineering, I share knowledge through technical writing on Medium.

resume.description: 7+ years architecting distributed systems, high-throughput API platforms, and production AI infrastructure across AWS and GCP.

experiences.position: Senior Software Engineer (Backend / Platform) at Bitsmedia
experiences.bullets: Architected high-throughput distributed microservices using Node.js (NestJS) on GKE sustaining 3000+ RPS, Designed production API platform with rate limiting and HMAC request signing serving millions of users, Built event-driven streaming pipelines using Pub/Sub and Debezium/Kafka with Dataflow and BigQuery, Led LLM-powered content generation platform orchestrating multimodal AI inference pipelines, Optimized Redis caching achieving 40% reduction in API latency, Owned CI/CD pipelines and IaC deployments across GCP with comprehensive observability

experiences.position: Senior Software Engineer at Sysco Labs
experiences.bullets: Developed distributed microservices using Java (Spring Boot) on AWS ECS for freight management, Built real-time streaming pipelines using AWS Kinesis and Lambda, Implemented OAuth 2.0 and RBAC for enterprise workflows, Established IaC using Terraform and automated CI/CD with Docker
Developed secure backend APIs in Node.js for financial trading systems, Containerized services using Docker with monitoring and observability

education.universityPara: Bachelor of Science in Computer Engineering
